welcome.title: Welcome to Actiko
welcome.body: Track your daily activities with a single tap. Here's a quick 1-minute tour.

createActivity.title: Create your first activity
createActivity.body: Add an activity you want to track — like exercise, reading, or studying.

record.title: Tap to record
record.body: Just tap an activity card to log it. No friction, no fuss — easy to keep up.

done.title: You're all set
done.body: That's everything you need to know. Start recording your every day.
